title: dryopteris oligophylla var. typica
intro: Dryopteris oligophylla var. typica, also known as the East Asian autumn fern, is a species of fern belonging to the Dryopteris genus. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of East Asian autumn fern include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and reduce the risk of certain diseases such as cancer and diabetes. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea, or made into capsules or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
